item.title: Are You at a Bad Dealership? Watch for These 10 Red Flags! PART 4!
item.description: Car shopping can turn sour fast. What warning signs should you spot before signing at the dealership?

item.title: Mustang dumpster
item.description: A classic car tossed aside like trash. What led this Mustang to end up in such an unexpected place?

item.title: Someone 4,130 Miles Away Bought Our Subaru
item.description: Distance didn’t stop this deal. How did a buyer thousands of miles away end up with our Subaru?
